description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test windows wheels that runs on push, pull request, and create events. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment with a conditional job that skips internal pull requests. It checks out the code, cythonizes, and then runs tests across multiple Python versions (3.6-3.10) on both amd64 and x86 architectures using a bash shell and ci/runtests.sh script. Finally, it uploads the resulting wheels as an artifact named win-wheels from the ./dist path.
